class.name: LunariSyntaxHighlighter
class.brief_description: A Lunari syntax highlighter for the Godot script editor.
class.description: Highlights Lunari/Ruby keywords, Godot API types, utility functions, annotations, comments, strings, and word-list literals in [code].lu[/code] scripts. [b]Note:[/b] This class is editor-only because it relies on editor theme settings.
